item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)

item.title: In an Oval Office meeting, President Trump told Darline Grah…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: In an Oval Office meeting, President Trump told Darline Graham “I like you most” to fill her late brother’s Senate seat. But even within South Carolina, little is known about her public policy views.
item.content:encoded: In an Oval Office meeting, President Trump told Darline Graham “I like you most” to fill her late brother’s Senate seat. But even within South Carolina, little is known about her public policy views.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 - 山根顕人 | 少年ジャンプ＋ 猫になっ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 - 山根顕人 | 少年ジャンプ＋

猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 山根顕人 とある老夫婦。ある日、おじいさんが起きると、おばあさんが猫になっていた。家事ができないおじいさんは、一人奮闘するが…？
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 - 山根顕人 | 少年ジャンプ＋

猫になっても／ジャンプ＋漫画賞 2026年3-4月期 山根顕人 とある老夫婦。ある日、おじいさんが起きると、おばあさんが猫になっていた。家事ができないおじいさんは、一人奮闘するが…？

item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com In talking with recent college …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

In talking with recent college graduates, Emi Nietfeld has found that “like job seekers of all ages, they feel terrified and discouraged,” she writes. “But one thing stood out: Many students told me that ambition as I knew it no longer makes sense.”
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

In talking with recent college graduates, Emi Nietfeld has found that “like job seekers of all ages, they feel terrified and discouraged,” she writes. “But one thing stood out: Many students told me that ambition as I knew it no longer makes sense.”

item.description: A veces filóloga, siempre antifascista.
item.content:encoded: A veces filóloga, siempre antifascista.

item.title: #青空ごはん部 #入院中病院食 【 日本歴代第六位 】 猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒 京都の気温は３９.３℃ …
item.author: 園芸の狼 (@gardeningwerewolf.bsky.social)
item.description:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 日本歴代第六位 】

猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒

京都の気温は３９.３℃
観光どころじゃありませんなァ 🫒

愛知県豊田市では４０.８℃
そして静岡県佐久間では日本歴代六位タイ記録となる４１.１℃ を記録、とうとう一線を越えて来ました … 🫒
みなさまも暑気あたりには充分にお気を付けを … 🙇🫒

さてさて、リハビリ体操は自転車運動のペダリングをハードの設定で二十分間、ちょっぴり脚力が付いたみたいで、昨日よりスムーズにヤり遂げました 🫒

明日も無理せず頑張ってチカラを蓄えてゆきたいと思います… 😆🫒

(何故かお昼ご飯の画像ファイルが開かない …)
item.content:encoded:
#青空ごはん部
#入院中病院食

【 日本歴代第六位 】

猛暑 お見舞い申し上げます 🫒

京都の気温は３９.３℃
観光どころじゃありませんなァ 🫒

愛知県豊田市では４０.８℃
そして静岡県佐久間では日本歴代六位タイ記録となる４１.１℃ を記録、とうとう一線を越えて来ました … 🫒
みなさまも暑気あたりには充分にお気を付けを … 🙇🫒

さてさて、リハビリ体操は自転車運動のペダリングをハードの設定で二十分間、ちょっぴり脚力が付いたみたいで、昨日よりスムーズにヤり遂げました 🫒

明日も無理せず頑張ってチカラを蓄えてゆきたいと思います… 😆🫒

(何故かお昼ご飯の画像ファイルが開かない …)

item.title: にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧…
item.author: ねこぱすー@sync (@aria-sync.bsky.social)
item.description:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
こんばんわ🌙ᩚ✩.*˚
今日は夜勤でぶっ続け昼勤も入るんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日も一日頑張るぞいو( ˙꒳˙ )٩
#こんばんわ
#イマソラ
#空の向こう
#夜の街並
item.content:encoded:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
こんばんわ🌙ᩚ✩.*˚
今日は夜勤でぶっ続け昼勤も入るんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾

item.title: the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" f…
item.author: nude antifa goat (@goat.sex)
item.description:
the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" framing is hilarious, given that a lot of these divisions were initially formed because men were deeply embarrassed any time a woman beat them at a sport

olympic shooting was mixed gender right up until a woman won the gold
item.content:encoded:
the whole "women's sports exist to protect women from men" framing is hilarious, given that a lot of these divisions were initially formed because men were deeply embarrassed any time a woman beat them at a sport

olympic shooting was mixed gender right up until a woman won the gold

item.title: こんばんは お疲れ様です 今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないか…
item.author: 🦀川口 掌🦀 (@kawaguchitenohira.bsky.social)
item.description:
こんばんは
お疲れ様です

今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないかなぁ と、まるで小学生の母親の様なことを呟きつつ

水分補給🥤にしっかりで熱帯夜を乗り越えましょう(*•̀ㅂ•́)و✧

おやすみなさい🌆
item.content:encoded:
こんばんは
お疲れ様です

今日も猛暑日 毎日暑い日が続きますね 秋は夏休みの向こう側ですよね 早く夏休み終わらないかなぁ と、まるで小学生の母親の様なことを呟きつつ

水分補給🥤にしっかりで熱帯夜を乗り越えましょう(*•̀ㅂ•́)و✧

おやすみなさい🌆

item.title: ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙 今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄 本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をし…
item.author: ｈｉｋｏ１９８１.ｂｓｋｙ.ｓｏｃｉａｌ (@hiko1981.bsky.social)
item.description:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
７月の後半に入り、これからますます厳しい暑い日々が訪れてきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調良く元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴
item.content:encoded:
ユーザーの皆さん、こんばんは🌙
今日一日、お仕事や勉強とお疲れ様でした😄
本日は、千代仔ちゃんの投稿に多くの評価をして頂き、ありがとうございます😊そんな皆さんに深く感謝致します。
７月の後半に入り、これからますます厳しい暑い日々が訪れてきますが、そんな暑さに負けずに体調良く元気に過ごしていきましょう。
それでは、明日も良い一日を。おやすみなさい😴

item.title: トンテキ肉のムニエル風 昨日のトライアルオープンセールでゲットした、 g98円の特売品を 同じく開店セール価格のゴーヤ…
item.author: 101匹足利尊氏 (@wandw.bsky.social)
item.description:
トンテキ肉のムニエル風

昨日のトライアルオープンセールでゲットした、
g98円の特売品を
同じく開店セール価格のゴーヤと共に焼く。

#青空ごはん部 #自炊班
item.content:encoded:
トンテキ肉のムニエル風

昨日のトライアルオープンセールでゲットした、
g98円の特売品を
同じく開店セール価格のゴーヤと共に焼く。

#青空ごはん部 #自炊班

item.title: 𝙾𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚘𝚛𝚗 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚙𝚝𝚑𝚜…
item.author: 𝚂𝚝𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝙼𝚘𝚞𝚗𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗 (@standingmountain.bsky.social)
item.description:
𝙾𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚘𝚛𝚗 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚙𝚝𝚑𝚜 𝚘𝚏 𝙱𝚎𝚒𝚗𝚐, 𝚌𝚊𝚗 𝚜𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚜𝚏𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚕..

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚕 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚐𝚗𝚒𝚣𝚎𝚜 𝚘𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚕—
𝙸𝚝 𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚐𝚜 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚙𝚎𝚛𝚏𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗, 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚛𝚞𝚝𝚑.

#LovesAll
item.content:encoded:
𝙾𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚘𝚛𝚗 𝚏𝚛𝚘𝚖 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚍𝚎𝚙𝚝𝚑𝚜 𝚘𝚏 𝙱𝚎𝚒𝚗𝚐, 𝚌𝚊𝚗 𝚜𝚊𝚝𝚒𝚜𝚏𝚢 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚕..

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚜𝚘𝚞𝚕 𝚛𝚎𝚌𝚘𝚐𝚗𝚒𝚣𝚎𝚜 𝚘𝚗𝚕𝚢 𝚠𝚑𝚊𝚝 𝚒𝚜 𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚕—
𝙸𝚝 𝚕𝚘𝚗𝚐𝚜 𝚗𝚘𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚙𝚎𝚛𝚏𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗, 𝚋𝚞𝚝 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚝𝚛𝚞𝚝𝚑.

#LovesAll

item.title: I was reading in public — always risky — and writing notes i…
item.author: Tressie McMillan Cottom (@tressiemcphd.bsky.social)
item.description: I was reading in public — always risky — and writing notes in the margin, as I do. Some guy intervened to tell me that he could never write in a book. Seemed like a personal problem that has nothing to do with me? Anyway, once again daydreaming of walking into the ocean.
item.content:encoded: I was reading in public — always risky — and writing notes in the margin, as I do. Some guy intervened to tell me that he could never write in a book. Seemed like a personal problem that has nothing to do with me? Anyway, once again daydreaming of walking into the ocean.

item.title: BREAKING: Canine delivers strongest bipartisan statement of …
item.author: 𝕊𝕦𝕟𝕕𝕒𝕖 𝔾𝕦𝕣𝕝 (@sundaedivine.lol)
item.description: BREAKING: Canine delivers strongest bipartisan statement of the year.

item.title: In the boxes of the books from my grandparents, I found and …
item.author: K On The Beach (@konthebeach.bsky.social)
item.description: In the boxes of the books from my grandparents, I found and claimed these 1884 edition of Little Women and 1886 edition of Jo’s Boys by Louisa May Alcott. Both were given to my grandma in 1927 when she was 13 by her aunt.
item.content:encoded: In the boxes of the books from my grandparents, I found and claimed these 1884 edition of Little Women and 1886 edition of Jo’s Boys by Louisa May Alcott. Both were given to my grandma in 1927 when she was 13 by her aunt.

item.title: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adap…
item.author: Colin Dickey (@colindickey.com)
item.description: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.
item.content:encoded: Please stop arguing about the historical accuracy of an adaptation of a book that has a cyclops and a couple of witches and some giants. I’m begging you.

item.title: Wow, Tesla down 16% today? Investors did *not* like that ear…
item.author: Dr. Pete Meyers (@dr-pete.bsky.social)
item.description: Wow, Tesla down 16% today? Investors did *not* like that earnings call. Honestly makes me wonder if they listened to the previous few earnings calls, which were also horseshit.
item.content:encoded: Wow, Tesla down 16% today? Investors did *not* like that earnings call. Honestly makes me wonder if they listened to the previous few earnings calls, which were also horseshit.

item.title: Good morning. Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life…
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning.
Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life are what give us the energy to fly, the necessities to endure.
I hope you have a great day.
#imageandverse #bees #photography #bloomscrolling #flowers #insects #pollinators #ECK #EastCoastKin #mygarden
item.content:encoded:
Good morning.
Balance in the symbiotic relationships of life are what give us the energy to fly, the necessities to endure.
I hope you have a great day.
#imageandverse #bees #photography #bloomscrolling #flowers #insects #pollinators #ECK #EastCoastKin #mygarden

item.title: The 2028 Olympics should not be held in the US. The World Cu…
item.author: hope reins (@hopereins.bsky.social)
item.description:
The 2028 Olympics should not be held in the US. The World Cup Should Have Been Moved To A County That Has global Dignity and Respect.
We have become a pariah around the world because of corruption, lies and racism.
Every true American should be infuriated and ashamed. Enough!
item.content:encoded:
The 2028 Olympics should not be held in the US. The World Cup Should Have Been Moved To A County That Has global Dignity and Respect.
We have become a pariah around the world because of corruption, lies and racism.
Every true American should be infuriated and ashamed. Enough!

item.title: This is what life looks like when you don't have any bills t…
item.author: For the Love of Missy (@missybbbobtail.bsky.social)
item.description: This is what life looks like when you don't have any bills to pay, emails to send or deadlines to make.
item.content:encoded: This is what life looks like when you don't have any bills to pay, emails to send or deadlines to make.
